title: Jay's Marker Textures 128 x 128
body:
The 128x Version of my Marker Texture Pack.\
Gritty, Sketch-like, drawn in real life with markers on composition grid paper, scaled down to 128x for performance.\
Vanilla-Inspired with some creative liberties.\
Inspired by EdgeCaseLabs on YouTube, where she draws textures with paint, I decided to go the marker route.


[Current List of Textures Added](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1c4qsm2lIChHX2VEMc48dzBH7YD3Q2cbsG3CFKBMmVlY/edit?usp=sharing)

Recommendations for most high resolution texture packs are 4-6gb of ram being allocated. If you use mods, I would recommend performance-enhancing mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) to further increase performance for any large texture pack.

_Performance may vary depending on device_
